hero.title: Crafting events of national scale
hero.subtitle: From concept and script to full production - Tan Chau Thanh has delivered large-scale political and cultural events since 2018.

about.title: Your events & communications partner since 2018
about.body: Tan Chau Thanh delivers end-to-end event solutions: directing, scripting, production, staffing and equipment. Our experienced team has contributed to national-scale programs including the SEA Games 22 closing ceremony and the 1000th Anniversary of Thang Long – Hanoi.

direction.title: Directing & Scripting
direction.desc: Concept development, scripting and directing for programs and events.

talent.title: Event talent
talent.desc: Bands, singers, MCs, dance and performance groups, hostesses.

equipment.title: Event equipment
equipment.desc: Modern sound, lighting, staging and instruments at grand scale.

contact.title: Start your event
contact.subtitle: Contact Tan Chau Thanh for consultation and to bring your program to life.

aboutPage.title: Tan Chau Thanh Co., Ltd
aboutPage.lead: Founded in 2018, Tan Chau Thanh is a professional event and communications partner in Hanoi — delivering end-to-end solutions from concept and script to production, staffing and equipment.

programs.p1: SEA Games 22 closing ceremony (2003) — My Dinh Stadium
programs.p2: 1000th Anniversary of Thang Long – Hanoi (2010) — Stage No. 5 “City for Peace”
programs.p3: “I love my Fatherland” (2015) — My Dinh Square, a 10,000-member card stunt
programs.p5: “I love my Fatherland” at Hung Temple (2019) — Vietnam Youth Federation
programs.p6: Welcoming Party congresses toward the 14th National Party Congress

aboutPage.collaborators: A professional network of choreographers, composers, dance and vocal groups, with many People's/Meritorious Artists and renowned singers: Quang Tho, Quoc Hung, Lan Anh, Dang Duong, Trong Tan, Anh Tho, Viet Hoan… and MCs Son Lam, Hoai Anh, Hong Nhung.

servicesPage.title: End-to-end event solutions
servicesPage.lead: Tan Chau Thanh handles every stage of a program — from creative content to production and on-site operations.

contactPage.title: Get in touch with Tan Chau Thanh
contactPage.lead: Leave your details or reach us directly — we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
